TestRunFacet.description: Results of test executions associated with this run, capturing test outcomes and configured severities independently of dataset attribution.

tests.description: List of test executions and their results.

TestExecution.description: A single test execution and its result.

status.description: Whether the test found issues: 'pass' (no issues found), 'fail' (issues found), 'skip' (not executed). Independent of severity — a test can fail without blocking the pipeline when severity is 'warn'.

severity.description: The configured consequence of a test failure: 'error' (blocks pipeline execution) or 'warn' (produces a warning only, does not block). A test with severity 'warn' and status 'fail' means issues were found but execution continued.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the test checks.
description.example: Ensures all order IDs are unique across the table.

expected.description: The expected value or threshold for the test, serialized as a string.

actual.description: The actual value observed during the test, serialized as a string.

content.description: The test body, e.g. a SQL query or expression.
content.example: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE amount < 0

contentType.description: The format of the content field, allowing consumers to interpret or filter test content. Common values include 'sql', 'json', 'expression'.

params.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs for check-specific inputs.
